title: Binary Tree From Inorder And Postorder

hints: The last element in postorder is always the root of the tree.
Use a hashmap to store the index of each element in the inorder array for O(1) lookup.
Find the root's position in inorder array. Elements to the left form the left subtree, elements to the right form the right subtree.
Recursively build left and right subtrees using the appropriate ranges from both arrays.
For left subtree: inorder[ins to rootidx-1], postorder[ps to ps+length-1].
For right subtree: inorder[rootidx+1 to ine], postorder[ps+length to pe-1].
